content: Verify current Java FOSS compiles without errors
Verify public API signatures match On-Premise 26.1.0
Review PolygonModifier - determine if it should be removed/stubbed
Compare .NET FOSS API surface with Java FOSS
Fix PropertyCollection: Add get(int idx) method and ObjectProperty class
Fix Property: Add getExtra(), setExtra(), getValueType() methods
Fix GlobalTransform: Add getEulerAngles(), getTransformMatrix() methods
Fix Interpolation enum: Add missing values
Fix Quaternion: Rename fromEuler() to fromEulerAngle() and fix parameter order
Fix Matrix4: Update to use fromEulerAngle()
Fix PropertyCollection: Use concrete class instead of abstract class
Add missing utility classes (Vector2, BoundingBox2D, etc.)
Add missing core classes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere, etc.)
Add missing shading classes (Texture, PbrMaterial, etc.)
Add missing file format options (ObjLoadOptions, StlLoadOptions, etc.)
Add missing animation classes (AnimationNode, AnimationChannel, etc.)
Add missing file format plugins (Draco, PLY, etc.)
